title: papaver × boissierianum
intro: Papaver × boissierianum, also known as the Boissier poppy or Himalayan poppy, is a hybrid plant species in the poppy family (Papaveraceae) that combines characteristics of the Papaver alpinum and Papaver radicatum. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving compounds such as alkaloids and isoquinoline derivatives. The health benefits of Papaver × boissierianum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into tinctures, infusions, or capsules, and are used to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and support overall well-being.
